title: 京都大賞典の後に・実り

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And Satono Diamond is first across the finish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: She looks like she's in great shape to me!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She ran so beautifully! She just kept charging
straight ahead with supreme focus...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's like she didn't let anything faze her or lead her
astray. I'm spellbound...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. The very result I was expecting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Had she faltered here, it would have meant she
wasn't fit to challenge me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...This is it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: This is my style of running!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Everything felt perfectly natural today!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's a huge relief to know that you didn't see any
issues!
choice_data_list: There was a lot of power in your strides.
There was a lot of power in your strides.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not that she's necessarily gotten a lot
stronger, but I tell her about the improvement in
the power of her strides and her core stability.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Really? But I wasn't focused on that at all while I
was running...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that's she regained her form, I imagine the
fruits of her training are starting to emerge
naturally.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad! Then it should be possible for me to
build up my physical strength!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It may even be possible for me to race overseas
someday...
choice_data_list: Let's find the best way for you to progress.
Let's find the best way for you to progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's possible her training might once again have a
negative influence on her running, but I don't
think there's anything to worry about anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She now understands the true essence of her
style, so we should be able to devise a method
that best complements her development.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm sure it will work out. I won't lose my way
again.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to focus on what's in front of me and
run for my desires!
choice_data_list: Use that mindset for the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I finally have my opportunity to race
McQueen! And not to mention Kita!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've dreamed of this for so long! And now it's
finally becoming reality...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And if I can win, it will serve as proof that I'm
talented enough to be an illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My role model and my long-time rival... To think
I'd have the opportunity to compete against them
both.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm prepared to put everything on the line for this!
